name: @elizaos/scenario-runner
description: Lean scenario runner for the WS7 scenario-schema architecture. Loads .scenario.ts files, executes them against a real @elizaos/core AgentRuntime with a live LLM, and emits a JSON report.

scripts.test:deterministic:e2e: SCENARIO_USE_LLM_PROXY=1 SCENARIO_LLM_PROXY_STRICT=1 bun src/cli.ts run test/scenarios --scenario deterministic-pr-smoke,deterministic-app-control-actions,deterministic-generated-app-routes,deterministic-todos-actions,deterministic-streaming-actions,deterministic-xr-view-actions,deterministic-mcp-actions-routes,deterministic-workflow-actions-routes,deterministic-github-actions-routes,deterministic-view-switching,deterministic-app-control-nl-routing,deterministic-browser-actions,deterministic-lifeops-scheduled-tasks,deterministic-coding-tools-actions,deterministic-agent-skills-actions,deterministic-media-emote-actions,deterministic-gitpathology-actions --report-dir ../../reports/scenarios/pr-deterministic --run-dir ../../reports/scenarios/pr-deterministic
